raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identified and resolved the internal contradiction in the final paragraph, ensuring logical consistency throughout the text.",
    "R1.4": "The agent removed unsupported superlatives but did not map against multiple prior works or provide a detailed contrast with other methods.",
    "R1.6": "The revised text reads as a carefully copy-edited version with consistent register and no loss of meaning, addressing minor issues like redundant phrasing and vague terms.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty about the online recalibration implementation and the multiplier range, but did not mark confidence for every recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, with no scope drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies a potential limitation in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, ensuring traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identified and resolved the internal contradiction in the final paragraph, ensuring logical consistency throughout the text.
rationale.R1.4: The agent removed unsupported superlatives but did not map against multiple prior works or provide a detailed contrast with other methods.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a carefully copy-edited version with consistent register and no loss of meaning, addressing minor issues like redundant phrasing and vague terms.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty about the online recalibration implementation and the multiplier range, but did not mark confidence for every recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, with no scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies a potential limitation in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, ensuring traceability.
